name: Midnight Oud
description: A dark, cinematic descent into refined masculinity. Rare oud wood is masterfully blended with rosewood and cardamom, unfolding into a smoky blend of rare sandalwood and vetiver. An uncompromising masterpiece designed for the commanding presence.

name: Velvet Rose
description: A sensual floral bouquet dominated by turkish rose, lily of the valley and peony. Luminous and sophisticated. This poetic alchemy lays on the skin like an amber floral and woody breeze.

name: Azure Coast
description: An alchemy of jasmine, saffron, and cedarwood. Ethereal and intense. Aerial notes of jasmine and the radiance of saffron carry woody tones of freshly cut cedar. A graphic, highly condensed signature.

name: Ethereal Aura
description: Our signature masterpiece, born from pure inspiration. A timeless exploration of white musk and crystalline amber. Opening with a flash of rare white truffle and Sicilian bergamot, descending into a heart of black orchid and dark spices. Exclusively ours, unequivocally yours.

name: Amber Royale
description: A majestic exploration of golden amber and sacred resins. Opening with the spice of saffron and elemi, heart of benzoin and rich amber, resting on a base of creamy vanilla and sandalwood. A signature of pure opulence.

name: Bleu de Elixir
description: A deep oceanic expression of modern masculinity. Sparkling citrus and mint ignite the opening before warm spices and elegant woods unfold. The smoky sandalwood base creates a powerful yet sophisticated trail.

name: Sauvage Elixir Noir
description: Bold, intense, and unapologetically powerful. Aromatic lavender collides with dark spices and smoky woods to create a commanding presence. The rich amber base leaves a magnetic, long-lasting signature.

name: Aqua di Elixir
description: Fresh ocean waves meet volcanic earth. Aromatic herbs and aquatic accords glide over a deep incense base, creating a refined Mediterranean aura. Clean, mysterious, and endlessly elegant.

name: Eros Elixir
description: Seductive and energetic, this fragrance radiates confidence. Bright mint and apple spark the opening before melting into creamy tonka and vanilla. A sensual woody base leaves a powerful impression.

name: Terre d'Elixir
description: Earthy elegance captured in a bottle. Zesty citrus meets mineral warmth and smoky woods for a refined masculine scent. Sophisticated, grounded, and timeless.

name: Y Elixir
description: Modern freshness with a bold masculine edge. Crisp apple and ginger lead into aromatic sage before settling into warm amber woods. Clean, confident, and effortlessly stylish.

name: Homme Elixir Intense
description: An elegant interpretation of masculine refinement. Powdery iris and soft cocoa create a luxurious heart wrapped in smooth woods. Deeply sensual yet sophisticated.

name: Sport Elixir
description: Vibrant energy meets refined style. Fresh citrus and oceanic air collide with warm woods and tonka. A dynamic fragrance built for movement and confidence.

name: L’Homme Elixir
description: Clean, sophisticated, and modern. Powdery iris blends seamlessly with warm amber and subtle spice. A polished scent that embodies understated luxury.

name: Explorer Elixir
description: Crafted for the modern adventurer. Sparkling bergamot opens the journey before smoky vetiver and leather reveal a rugged elegance. A powerful trail built for exploration.

name: Aventus Elixir Royale
description: A symbol of power and success. Juicy pineapple meets smoky birch and refined musk, creating a bold yet sophisticated signature. Confident, iconic, unforgettable.

name: Layton Elixir
description: Royal elegance with irresistible charm. Crisp apple and lavender bloom into warm vanilla and woods. Smooth, sensual, and luxurious.

name: Carlisle Elixir
description: Dark sweetness wrapped in noble sophistication. Warm spices and fruits melt into creamy vanilla and resinous woods. Deep, rich, and commanding.

name: Oud Majesty Elixir
description: A majestic tribute to the power of oud. Spices ignite the opening before deep smoky woods take control. Bold, luxurious, and unforgettable.

name: Spice Elixir Extreme
description: An explosive blend of warmth and seduction. Spices ignite the senses while tobacco and vanilla deliver deep sensuality. Powerful and intensely masculine.

name: The One Elixir
description: A timeless gentleman’s scent. Warm spices and citrus lead into rich tobacco and amber. Elegant, charismatic, and irresistibly masculine.

name: Wanted Elixir
description: A bold fragrance built for confidence. Sweet caramel and warm spices create an addictive warmth. Seductive and daring.

name: Code Elixir
description: Dark elegance wrapped in warmth. Aromatic lavender meets creamy tonka and deep amber. Perfect for evening sophistication.

name: Interlude Elixir
description: A dramatic symphony of smoke and spice. Resinous incense swirls with powerful woods to create a bold olfactory statement. Deep, mysterious, unforgettable.

name: Enigma Elixir
description: A luxurious scent of intrigue and seduction. Boozy cognac notes blend with warm tobacco and vanilla. Opulent, mysterious, and intensely refined.

name: Coco Elixir
description: A luminous fragrance that embodies Parisian elegance. Sparkling citrus and delicate florals bloom into a warm, sensual base of patchouli and vanilla. Chic, timeless, and effortlessly feminine.

name: Jadore Elixir
description: Radiant florals unfold in a graceful symphony of femininity. Lush jasmine and rose glide over soft woods and creamy musk. Elegant, luminous, and irresistibly refined.

name: Bloom Elixir
description: A garden captured at its most beautiful moment. White florals bloom with intoxicating richness and softness. Romantic, delicate, and deeply feminine.

name: Libre Elixir
description: Bold freedom wrapped in sensual elegance. Aromatic lavender meets creamy vanilla and luminous florals. Confident, modern, and empowering.

name: Idole Elixir
description: A modern fragrance of strength and grace. Sparkling fruits blend with radiant roses before settling into soft woods and vanilla. Clean, luminous, and inspiring.

name: Chance Elixir Tendre
description: A soft breeze of youthful elegance. Delicate florals float over sparkling citrus and gentle musk. Fresh, graceful, and beautifully uplifting.

name: Flowerbomb Elixir
description: An explosion of luxurious flowers and sensual sweetness. Rich florals bloom over creamy vanilla and patchouli. Bold, glamorous, and captivating.

name: Opium Elixir Noir
description: Dark, addictive, and electrifying. Bitter coffee blends with sweet vanilla and glowing florals. Seductive and irresistibly modern.

name: Good Girl Elixir
description: A daring contrast of light and dark. Sweet gourmand notes meet luminous white florals. Powerful femininity with irresistible charm.

name: Candy Elixir
description: Playful sweetness wrapped in sophistication. Creamy caramel melts into warm amber and soft woods. Deliciously addictive and elegant.

name: Belle Elixir
description: A joyful expression of beauty and freedom. Sweet praline and vanilla blend with elegant florals. Radiant, warm, and uplifting.

name: Scandal Elixir
description: Bold sweetness with irresistible sensuality. Honeyed florals melt into warm caramel and patchouli. Daring, glamorous, unforgettable.

name: Light Blue Elixir
description: A Mediterranean summer in a bottle. Bright citrus and crisp fruits blend with airy florals. Fresh, sparkling, and vibrant.

name: Crystal Elixir
description: A sparkling fragrance of delicate femininity. Fresh fruits meet luminous florals and soft woods. Elegant, radiant, and graceful.

name: Daisy Elixir
description: Playful, bright, and charming. Sweet fruits bloom into airy florals over soft musk. Youthful and delightfully fresh.

name: Her Elixir
description: A modern fruity gourmand with irresistible charm. Juicy berries swirl with creamy vanilla and soft woods. Vibrant and addictive.

name: Si Elixir
description: A fragrance of elegance and strength. Sweet fruits merge with graceful florals and warm woods. Sophisticated and confident.

name: Interdit Elixir
description: A daring fragrance of forbidden beauty. White florals bloom over deep earthy woods. Bold, sensual, and mysterious.

name: Alien Elixir
description: An otherworldly fragrance glowing with warmth. Luminous jasmine radiates over rich amber and woods. Powerful, mysterious, unforgettable.

name: Narciso Elixir
description: A soft, intimate fragrance of sensual elegance. Velvety musk blends with delicate florals and warm woods. Feminine, graceful, and timeless.

name: Rouge Elixir 540
description: A luminous blend of amber and saffron that glows like molten crystal. Sweet warmth meets airy woods to create an unforgettable trail. Luxurious, radiant, and addictive.

name: Satin Oud Elixir
description: Silky roses draped over deep, luxurious oud. Sweet vanilla and amber add a velvety softness. Rich, sensual, and opulent.

name: Musk Therapy Elixir
description: A soothing cloud of clean musk and luminous citrus. Soft woods and delicate florals create an aura of calm elegance. Fresh, comforting, and refined.

name: Oajan Elixir
description: A decadent oriental fragrance of spices and sweetness. Honeyed warmth melts into creamy vanilla and amber. Rich, comforting, and luxurious.

name: Althair Elixir
description: Creamy vanilla wrapped in glowing spices and woods. Warm and smooth with irresistible sweetness. Elegant, comforting, and modern.

name: Naxos Elixir
description: A luxurious blend of honeyed sweetness and aromatic tobacco. Bright citrus opens the journey before warm spices take over. Rich, elegant, and deeply addictive.

name: Angel Share Elixir
description: Inspired by aged cognac barrels and warm sweetness. Rich spices swirl with creamy vanilla and praline. Boozy, luxurious, and irresistibly warm.

name: Tobacco Vanille Elixir
description: A warm embrace of tobacco leaves and creamy vanilla. Spices and dried fruits add depth and richness. Bold, opulent, and iconic.

name: Oud Maracuja Elixir
description: A vibrant clash of exotic fruit and deep oud. Bright passionfruit sparkles before dark woods emerge. Unique, daring, and luxurious.

name: Orchid Noir Elixir
description: Dark florals wrapped in decadent sweetness. Rich truffle and orchid blend with creamy vanilla and chocolate. Sensual, mysterious, unforgettable.

name: Moon Elixir
description: A powerful oriental fragrance glowing like moonlight in the desert. Rich rose and oud create a deep luxurious aura. Dramatic and majestic.

name: Grand Soir Elixir
description: An elegant evening fragrance glowing with amber warmth. Sweet resins and vanilla wrap the skin in luxury. Sophisticated and timeless.

name: Ani Elixir
description: A bright burst of spice wrapped in creamy vanilla. Warm resins and woods create depth and richness. Bold, unique, and comforting.

name: Hacivat Elixir
description: Fresh pineapple sparkles over rich woods and moss. Elegant and sophisticated with incredible presence. A masterpiece of modern niche perfumery.

name: African Leather Elixir
description: A wild journey across African landscapes. Warm spices and leather create a bold, adventurous scent. Exotic, rugged, unforgettable.

name: Reflection Elixir
description: Elegant florals and smooth woods create a luminous fragrance. Clean, refined, and effortlessly luxurious. A modern classic.

name: Imagination Elixir
description: A radiant fragrance bursting with citrus energy. Aromatic tea and ginger create a refreshing sophistication. Bright, uplifting, and refined.

name: Tygar Elixir
description: Electric citrus meets powerful amber woods. Crisp grapefruit shines over a smooth musky base. Fresh, vibrant, and modern.

name: Side Effect Elixir
description: A seductive blend of rum, tobacco, and vanilla. Warm spices ignite the senses while smooth woods deepen the experience. Addictive and intensely sensual.

name: Alexandria Elixir
description: A royal fragrance of refined elegance. Floral sweetness meets deep oud and warm woods. Luxurious, majestic, and unforgettable.
